exploration_notes: The CSI driver integration in kubernetes/kubernetes spans two main areas: (1) The `pkg/volume/csi/` package implements the kubelet-side CSI node plugin client — `csi_client.go` defines the gRPC client interface (`csiClient`) and implementation (`csiDriverClient`) that wraps CSI Node RPCs (NodeStageVolume, NodePublishVolume, NodeGetInfo, etc.); `csi_plugin.go` implements the volume.VolumePlugin interface (`csiPlugin`); `csi_attacher.go` handles attach/detach via VolumeAttachment objects (`csiAtta
